memoryArtifacts.headline: An historic record and pictorial description of the town of Meriden, Connecticut
memoryArtifacts.description:
An historic record and pictorial description of the town of Meriden, Connecticut and men who have made it
by Gillespie, Charles Bancroft, 1865-1915; Curtis, George Munson

Publication date 1906
Topics Meriden, Conn. History
Publisher Meriden, Conn. Journal publishing co.
Collection allen_county; americana
Digitizing sponsor Internet Archive
Contributor Allen County Public Library Genealogy Center

memoryArtifacts.headline: Will of Simon Tuttle of Ringstead, Northamptonshire, England, made 1627 but not proved until after his death in 1630.
memoryArtifacts.description:
Names only 4 children, all sons, in this order of age:
RICHARD, JOHN, THOMAS (dec.) and WILLIAM. No daughters mentioned at all. Wife Isabel is not mentioned but she is proven by an emigration record with her sons.

popularStory.headline: Symon Tootill & Isabel Wells
popularStory.description:
[ 080 ]
	SYMON TOOTILL and ISABEL WELLS

	Symon Tootill, of Woodford, Northamptonshire, England, was a grown man, but not yet married, at the date of the will of his father, Richard Tootill, in 158 …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Simon Tuttle於1560年6月出生在英國諾薩普頓史爾林斯亞德時，他的父親Richard Tootil Tuttle30歲，母親Elizabeth13歲。他於1592年6月25日與Isabel Wells of Ringstead在英國諾福爾可塔爾斯頓結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。他去世於1630年6月15日在他的家鄉享年70歲，埋葬在英國諾薩普頓史爾林斯亞德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Simon Tuttle于1560年6月出生在英国諾薩普頓史爾林斯亞德时，他的父亲Richard Tootil Tuttle30岁，母亲Elizabeth13岁。他于1592年6月25日与Isabel Wells of Ringstead在英国諾福爾可塔爾斯頓结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。他去世于1630年6月15日在他的家乡享年70岁，埋葬在英国諾薩普頓史爾林斯亞德。

nameMeanings.name: Tuttle
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: possibly a variant of Thirkell, from the Middle English personal name T(h)irkill, T(h)urkill (Old Norse Thorkell, Thorkil, Thurkil, a shortened form of Thorketill from the god's name Thórr ‘Thor’ + ketill ‘kettle, cauldron’).

variants.name: Tuthill
meanings: English (Suffolk and Norfolk): variant of Toothill, primarily a Yorkshire habitational name from any of various places called with Old English tōt-hyll ‘lookout hill’, primarily Toothill in Rastrick (Yorkshire) and perhaps Tootle in Longridge (Lancashire), but also Tuttle Hill in Nuneaton (Warwickshire), and Tothill (Lincolnshire). There are several further minor placenames of this type that may have contributed to the surname. Also occasionally from Tottenhill (Norfolk), which derives from the Old English personal name Totta (genitive Tottan) + Old English hyll ‘hill’.

nameMeanings.name: Simon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Usual English form of Simeon , borne in the New Testament by various characters: two apostles, a brother of Jesus, a Pharisee, a leper, a tanner, a sorcerer (who offered money for the gifts of the Holy Ghost, giving rise to the term simony), and the man who carried Jesus's cross to the Crucifixion.

variants.name: Simen
meanings: Usual English form of Simeon , borne in the New Testament by various characters: two apostles, a brother of Jesus, a Pharisee, a leper, a tanner, a sorcerer (who offered money for the gifts of the Holy Ghost, giving rise to the term simony), and the man who carried Jesus's cross to the Crucifixion.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

en.lifeSummary: When Simon Tuttle was born in June 1560, in Ringstead, Northamptonshire, England, his father, Richard Tootil Tuttle, was 30 and his mother, Elizabeth, was 13. He married Isabel Wells of Ringstead on 25 June 1592, in Tharston, Norfolk, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. He died on 15 June 1630, in his hometown, at the age of 70, and was buried in Ringstead, Northamptonshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Simon Tuttle est né en juin 1560, à Ringstead, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, son père, Richard Tootil Tuttle, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth, avait 13 ans. Il a épousé Isabel Wells of Ringstead le 25 juin 1592, à Tharston, Norfolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Il est décédé le 15 juin 1630, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 70 ans, et a été enterré à Ringstead, Northamptonshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Simon Tuttle im Juni 1560 in Ringstead, Northamptonshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richard Tootil Tuttle 30 und seine Mutter Elizabeth 13. Er hat am 25. Juni 1592 in Tharston, Norfolk, England Isabel Wells of Ringstead geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne. Er starb am 15. Juni 1630 im Alter von 70 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Ringstead, Northamptonshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Simon Tuttle è nato il nel giugno 1560 nel Ringstead, Northamptonshire, England, il suo padre, Richard Tootil Tuttle, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth, aveva 13 anni. Lui sposato Isabel Wells of Ringstead il 25 giugno 1592, nel Tharston, Norfolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli. Morì il 15 giugno 1630, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 70 anni, e fu sepolto a Ringstead, Northamptonshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Simon Tuttleが1560年6月にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアリングステアドで生まれた時，父Richard Tootil Tuttleは30歳，母Elizabethは13歳であった。1592年6月25日にイギリスノーフォルクサルストンでIsabel Wells of Ringsteadと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。彼は1630年6月15日に故郷で70歳で死去し，イギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアリングステアドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Simon Tuttle(이)가 1560년 6월 영국 노르섬프토실르 링스테아드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard Tootil Tuttle(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth(은)는 13세였다. 그는 1592년 6월 25일 영국 노르폴크 스아르스턴에서 Isabel Wells of Ringstead(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1630년 6월 15일 그의 고향에서 70세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노르섬프토실르 링스테아드에 묻혔다.

mn.June 1560–15 June 1630: 1560 оны Зургаадугаар сар–1630 оны Зургаадугаар сарын 15

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Simon Tuttle nasceu em junho de 1560, em Ringstead, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard Tootil Tuttle, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth, tinha 13 anos. Ele casou-se com Isabel Wells of Ringstead em 25 de junho de 1592, em Tharston, Norfolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos. Ele faleceu em 15 de junho de 1630, em sua cidade natal, com 70 anos, e foi sepultado em Ringstead, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Simon Tuttle родился июнь 1560 г. в местности рингстид, нортамптоншир, Англия, его отцу по имени Richard Tootil Tuttle было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth, 13. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabel Wells of Ringstead 25 июня 1592 г. в местности тарстон, норфолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Он умер 15 июня 1630 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 70 лет и был похоронен в местности рингстид, нортамптоншир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Simon Tuttle nació en junio de 1560, en Ringstead, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Richard Tootil Tuttle, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Elizabeth, tenía 13 años. Se casó con Isabel Wells of Ringstead el 25 de junio de 1592, en Tharston, Norfolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos. Murió el 15 de junio de 1630, en su pueblo, a la edad de 70 años, y fue sepultado en Ringstead, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra.
